items.problem: Auto conversation ON sends non-user STT text such as you, Thank you, Beep into translation
items.proposal: Block obvious noise/background STT text and keep Auto ON as one-turn translation flow like OFF

items.problem: Auto conversation ends recording too early because endSilenceMs is too short for human turn taking
items.proposal: Conversation Engine Timing V1: minSpeechMs 200->600, endSilenceMs 420->1200, maxSilenceMs 1400->3000 for auto conversation mode

items.problem: Auto conversation ON should not be removed. It needs to be redesigned as Conversation Engine V1 because current auto mode cannot reliably decide human turn ending.
items.proposal: Redesign Auto Conversation ON as Conversation Engine V1. Keep OFF as one-turn push-to-talk. Apply ON-only timing changes first: minSpeechMs 200->600, endSilenceMs 420->1200, maxSilenceMs 1400->3000. Do not block normal words such as you or thank you. Focus on turn-taking timing instead of word blocking.
